description.value:
Frequency once per hour

Trigger You are attacked by a foe but haven't rolled yet.

In an emergency, your especially oozy body has adapted to split into multiple pieces to survive danger. A piece of you splits off to ward off a harmful blow. The triggering attacker must attempt a @Check[flat|dc:13]; on a success, the attack targets you normally; if they fail, the attack targets the piece of you that split off, destroying it. You become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} for 1 minute, after which time your body regrows the split-off part.
